name: Chain Material
name_jp: チェーン・マテリアル
desc: Any time you Fusion Summon a monster this turn, you can remove from play, from your side of the field, Deck, hand or Graveyard, Fusion Material Monsters that are listed on the Fusion Monster Card, and use them as Fusion Material Monsters. You cannot attack during the turn this card is activated. If you used this effect for a Fusion Summon, the Summoned Fusion Monster(s) is destroyed during the End Phase.
eff: Any time you Fusion Summon a monster this turn, you can remove from play, from your side of the field, Deck, hand or Graveyard, Fusion Material Monsters that are listed on the Fusion Monster Card, and use them as Fusion Material Monsters. You cannot attack during the turn this card is activated. If you used this effect for a Fusion Summon, the Summoned Fusion Monster(s) is destroyed during the End Phase.

action: Modifies which cards can be used as Fusion Material
Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the player's Deck as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the player's Graveyard as Fusion Materials
banished: Banishes Fusion Materials used in a Fusion Summon
